name: Framboise Raspberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
3. When the mixture comes to a boil, increase heat to high and cook, stirring constantly, for about 20 minutes.
4. As the mixture thickens, watch carefully to prevent sticking.
5. When the mixture reaches a jam-like consistency, remove from heat.
6. Pour into hot sterilized jars and seal with a vacuum lid (using the hot water bath method) or refrigerate for up to 6 weeks.
Notes: The delicate flavor of fresh raspberries combined with the smooth framboise (raspberry brandy) creates an exceptional jam that can be used as both a spread and a dessert garnish.
